feat.name: Crocodile's Twin
feat.special: You can only take this feat at 1st level.
feat.text: Your egg contained your twin, a crocodile. Considered a rare and auspicious event, you share a magical bond with this sibling. You gain a tiny crocodile as a familiar.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
